name: 4pc Harrington Mirrored Cocktail Fork Set - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your dining experience with this 4-Pack Stainless Steel Harrington Cocktail Forks from Threshold™. This cocktail fork set comes with four forks that feature a modern design and a shiny silver finish. These stainless steel utensils will blend easily with your tableware and glassware and will make serving shrimp cocktails and crab that much more stylish and fun.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
